title: Claude Code v2.1.143
summary: Plugin dependency enforcement with disable-chain hints; projected context cost estimates in plugin marketplace; PowerShell execution policy bypass; background session model/effort preservation; Windows Terminal + worktree fixes.

title: Claude Code v2.1.142
summary: New `claude agents` flags: --add-dir, --settings, --mcp-config, --plugin-dir, --permission-mode, --model, --effort, --dangerously-skip-permissions. Fast mode now defaults to Opus 4.7. Plugin LSP visibility + MCP timeout fixes.

title: Claude Code v2.1.141
summary: terminalSequence field for hooks (desktop notifications, window titles, bells); CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_PREFER_HTTPS env var; `claude agents --cwd <path>`; 40+ bug fixes covering permissions, MCP, rendering, terminal.

title: Claude Code v2.1.140
summary: Improved agent tool subagent_type matching (case/separator-insensitive); /goal hanging fix; background service startup improvements; settings hot-reload and loop scheduling fixes.

title: Claude Code Routines (research preview) — Scheduled & API-triggered automated workflows
summary: Routines let developers save a Claude Code config (prompt + repos + connectors) and trigger it on cron schedule, HTTP POST, or GitHub events. Runs on Anthropic-managed cloud infra. Research preview.

title: Cursor 3.0 — Agents Window + Design Mode
summary: Cursor 3.0 released with Agents Window for parallel agent management and Design Mode for UI-first development. Competing directly with Claude Code's agent session management.

title: Windsurf 2.0 — Agent Command Center + Devin Cloud (post-Google $2.4B deal)
summary: Windsurf 2.0 ships Agent Command Center and Devin Cloud integration. Google's $2.4B licensing deal for Windsurf/Codeium closed after OpenAI acquisition collapsed. Now back to Google-backed AI coding.

title: OpenAI Codex — ChatGPT mobile access + VS Code forks IDE extension
summary: Codex now accessible from ChatGPT mobile app by connecting to Mac running Codex app. IDE extension works with VS Code forks including Cursor and Windsurf.

title: Skills ecosystem: agentskills.io adopted by 40+ products; MCP hits 10,000+ public servers
summary: Agentskills.io open standard adopted by Claude Code, Codex CLI, Hermes Agent, OpenClaw and 40+ products. MCP ecosystem now has 10,000+ public servers. Skills and MCP complement each other: MCP = connectivity, Skills = procedural knowledge.
